title: Safely evolve a schema with migrations
description: Change the database through reversible migrations sequenced so the app stays deployable at each step.
body: Steps: 1. Write a migration with change (auto-reversible) or explicit up/down so it can roll back. 2. For destructive or large changes, sequence them: add nullable column, backfill in batches, add constraint, then drop the old column in a later deploy. 3. Avoid model code in migrations; use raw SQL or a local class so a later model change does not break old migrations. 4. Run db:migrate in CI and confirm schema.rb/structure.sql updates. 5. Verify rollback with db:rollback. Rollback point: the migration's down path. Validation: migrate then rollback returns the schema cleanly and the suite passes on the new schema.
